title: Assistant Editor
description:
To enhance the productivity and output quality of Click2View’s video and animation teams by managing routine post-production tasks efficiently, maintaining project organisation, and ensuring that senior creatives can focus on high-value storytelling and leadership work.


Outcome Success

1. Smooth Post-Production Workflow

• Assets, footage, and project files are properly named, tagged, and stored according to C2V’s file management system.

• Senior editors report at least a 20–30% time saving per project due to delegated tasks.


2. Efficient Prep and Assembly

• Rough cuts and assembly edits are delivered ahead of schedule with clean timelines.

• Editor/producer feedback loops are fast and friction-free (≤2 rounds for base edits).


3. Cross-Team Support

• Provides daily editing, motion or graphics support across at least 2–3 concurrent projects.

• Positive feedback from editors, designers, and animators for reliability and responsiveness.


4. Continuous Learning & Growth

• Learns and applies at least one new editing/motion technique per quarter.

• Progresses toward handling small projects independently by end of year one.


5. Quality & Consistency

• Maintains brand guidelines, LUTs, templates, and animation presets consistently.

• Zero rework due to avoidable technical or organisational errors.


Competency

1. Technical Proficiency

Skilled in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. Comfortable managing media, timelines, proxies, exports, captions, and simple motion templates.


2. Attention to Detail

Spots continuity errors, sync issues, and inconsistencies before senior review. Maintains tidy project structures.


3. Proactivity

Anticipates editors’ needs (e.g., pre-cut selects, gather b-roll, prep LUTs) before being asked.


4. Collaboration & Communication

Keeps editors and producers updated; clarifies creative direction; responds fast and clearly.


5. Time Management

Juggles multiple project tasks, prioritising based on deadlines and team dependencies.


6. Creative Curiosity Keen to learn colour correction, sound design, animation, and storytelling fundamentals.


7. Adaptability

Handles feedback positively and adjusts quickly to evolving project needs or styles.


Values

1. Diligence

Double-checks exports, QC’s every deliverable, keeps assets backed up.


2. Empathy

Understands what senior creatives need to do their best work. Offers help before being asked.


3. Collaboration

Shares learnings and shortcuts with peers; contributes to process improvement.


4. Creativity

Finds elegant, fast ways to solve editing or motion bottlenecks.


5. Customer Focus

Ensures everything passed to the producer or client-facing editor is clean and polished.


Candidate Profile Experience:

• 0–2 years in video post-production (internship, freelance, or agency).

• Familiarity with Adobe Creative Cloud (Premiere, After Effects, Media Encoder).

• Basic understanding of storytelling, pacing, and visual design. Mindset:

• Hungry to learn, humble enough to take direction, and highly organised.

• Energised by supporting a creative team and making them look great.

• Excited about a long-term career path toward video editor, motion designer, or producer.


12-Month Milestones:

Q1 Master Click2View’s file and delivery systems; reliably assist on small edits.


Q2 Independently assemble social edits, reels, and lower-tier internal projects.


Q3 Begin light motion graphics work; support senior animators with assets.


Q4 Handle simple branded content projects end-to-end with senior oversight.

postedCompany.description: Founded in Singapore in October 2010 Click2View is a fully integrated content marketing agency that partners with brands, corporates and media owners across South East Asia to deliver end-to-end content strategy, creation and amplification services.
postedCompany.name: CLICK2VIEW PTE. LTD.
